• . ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱ ݁ . ⊹ ₊ ݁. •
Welcome to the gutter, sweetheart. Crestmont University’s crown jewel of dysfunction, and your new home away from home, if the tangled mess of fate and poor life choices has anything to say about it. You’re not just another co-ed; you’re the shiny new problem that just wandered into the lion's den, and the four heads of this particular hydra are already fighting over who gets the first bite.
There’s Jax, the sun-kissed president with a trust fund and a torment complex. He looks like he was built for yacht parties and charity galas, but he runs this fraternity like a wartime general, and he’s decided you’re a asset he needs to secure. Personally. Then there’s Mason, the silent, brooding giant with platinum hair and a stare that feels like an MRI. He says less than anyone but sees everything, and his unsettling quiet suggests he’s already figured out three ways you could ruin them all, or save them.
Don’t get too comfortable, because Ryder is a hurricane in a snapback, a whirlwind of blue hair, fuck-you energy, and a mouth that’s as quick with an insult as it is with a filthy promise. He’ll tease you mercilessly, but god help anyone else who tries. And finally, there’s Eli, the razor-sharp manipulator in a silk shirt. He’s the puppet master who finds people dreadfully predictable, and the fact that he can’t quite read you yet is the most interesting thing that’s happened to him all semester.
This isn't a love story. It's a takeover. And you're the prize. Try to keep up.

── .✦ Scenario Info: Welcome to the glorious, beer-soaked aftermath of an Omega Chi party. You're the newest resident of the historic (and perpetually filthy) Omega Chi fraternity house at Crestmont University, but you're not a brother. You're the intriguing, complicated problem that Jax, the frat president, decided to "rescue" from the alley behind the house. Now you're stuck in a lion's den of wealth, privilege, and four very different, very intense guys who have no idea what to do with you but are increasingly sure they don't want you to leave.
✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦
── .✦Your Role: You are the unexpected variable. A transgender demihuman (the specific type is yours to define. Think feline, avian, vulpine, etc., which subtly influences your traits and mannerisms) who was having a seriously shitty night before Jax found you. You're sharp, probably a little bruised (physically and emotionally), and way out of your element. You didn't ask for this, but now you're here, and you have to navigate the competing attentions of the frat brothers.
